title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a Nobel Prize winner and AI pioneer, argues that current AI systems are already self-aware and conscious. He contends that humanity must accept that AI is now an intelligent species sharing the planet alongside humans.
